input:
Braindump:
rewrite the authentication middleware, design the new billing page, research competitor pricing models, write a blog post about agent tooling, restructure the test suite, build a demo for the investor meeting, migrate the database to the new schema

Focus: Money
Date: 2026-03-13
description: All high-activation-energy tasks. The skill must sort between Block Time (moves money: billing page, investor demo, database migration) and Kill/Delegate (doesn't move money: rewrite auth, restructure tests, blog post). Every Block Time item must have an entry point.
rationale: Stress-tests entry point generation and kill reasoning when everything is high-energy.
